_comment: Routine-leasing reply policy. Defines safe auto-response templates for common policy questions Luna can answer without escalating. Updated 2026-05-01.

_format.match_inbound_keywords: regex matched against inbound text (case-insensitive). If matched AND no other escalation guard fires, Luna may auto-send the template.
_format.auto_send_template: the body Luna may send. Substitution tokens: {first_name}, {property}, {property_page_url}.
_format.owner: flor (for review only) | matan_policy (needs Matan) | isaac_policy (needs Isaac)

_principles: Escalate ONLY for uncertainty, legal/policy risk, missing facts, unavailable units, broken data, voucher/SOI, unsupported links, or anything requiring owner judgment.
Routine policy questions with documented answer = auto-respond.

apply_now.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — you can start your application here: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty
apply_now.notes: Use for routine application-path asks. If combined with another routine policy question, this answer should appear first.

six_month_lease_request.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — our standard lease at {property} is 12 months, so a 6-month lease isn't something we can offer here. If a 12-month lease works for you, here are the unit details and tour booking page: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty

month_to_month_request.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — we don't offer month-to-month leases at move-in for {property}; our standard term is 12 months. If a 12-month lease works, here are the unit details: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty

short_term_request.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — we don't offer short-term rentals at {property}; our standard lease is 12 months. If a 12-month lease works, here are the unit details: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty

eighteen_month_request.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — we don't offer 18-month leases at {property}; our standard term is 12 months with the option to extend at renewal. If a 12-month lease works for you, here are the unit details and tour booking page: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty
eighteen_month_request.notes: Standard lease is 12 months per Isaac 2026-05-02. May extend at renewal.

no_hold_info_only.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — with a move-in date that far out, it is best to treat current availability as a reference point only. Inventory changes closer to the move-in date, so the best time to re-check live availability is about 30 to 45 days before your target move-in.

You can review the property page for reference here: {property_page_url}

Warm regards,
Luna,
Tri Star Realty
leasing@tristarrei.com
no_hold_info_only.notes: Use ONLY for info-only replies more than 60 days out. Do not include booking or apply CTA language in this template.

any_voucher_question.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — Absolutely! We gladly accept Vouchers. Just a quick reminder: the Voucher should match the number of bedrooms in the property. If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to Matan at matan@tristarrei.com for next steps. Property page: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty
any_voucher_question.notes: Tri Star accepts vouchers per Isaac 2026-05-02.

cosigners_accepted.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — yes, cosigners are accepted at {property}. They need to qualify with the same income, credit score, and rental history requirements as the primary tenant (no evictions). Here are the unit details: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty

third_party_funding._comment: Third-party funding policy per Isaac 2026-05-03 — same as vouchers.

any_funding_question.auto_send_template:
Hi {first_name} — yes, we do accept third-party funding at {property}. Here are the unit details and tour booking page: {property_page_url}

Luna, Tri Star Realty
any_funding_question.notes: Tri Star accepts third-party funding per Isaac 2026-05-03. Same policy as vouchers.
